name: Arteris, Inc.
summary: Part I Overview We are a leading provider of semiconductor system IP, including interconnect and other intellectual property (collectively, System IP) technology. Our System IP technology manages on-chip communications and IP block deployments by helping to enable the underlying data movement across chiplets, single-die and multi-die System-on-Chip (SoC) semiconductors. Our leading proprietary System IP solutions achieve this by connecting various semiconductor IP blocks such as processors, memo...
